CustomField.description: How the revenue share tiers are applied. Waterfall: each tier rate applies only within its ARR range. Flat: one rate for all revenue. Time-Based Then Tiered: enhanced rate for initial period, then standard tiers.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How the revenue share tiers are applied. Values: Waterfall (each tier rate applies only within its ARR range), Flat (one rate for all revenue), Time-Based Then Tiered (enhanced rate for initial period, then standard tiers).
CustomField.label: Grid Type
